description: Halo Public API is a developer-facing API for accessing Halo game data, including player profiles, match statistics, metadata, and user-generated content for Halo 5. It is offered through the Halo developer portal and uses subscription-based API access.
summary: haloapi.com exposes four Halo Public API HTTP surfaces for Metadata, Profile, Stats, and UGC; all require the same subscription key, sent either as header `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key` or query parameter `subscription-key`.
